summary: 2026-07-07 12:09:31 PDT - Reviewed `git log`, `git diff da433fc...HEAD`, and `reviews/rate-list-dedupe.md`. The `lastSavedRef` + `shouldPersistConfig` change correctly suppresses the clean-load echo, keeps dirty hydration to the single immediate repair save, and still lets a later immutable user edit save through the debounced path. I attempted the targeted Vitest run, but the read-only sandbox blocked Vite from writing its temp config file.
